query:
SELECT
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice,
    sum(l_quantity)
FROM
    customer,
    orders,
    lineitem
WHERE
    o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT
            l_orderkey
        FROM
            lineitem
        GROUP BY
            l_orderkey
        HAVING
            sum(l_quantity) > 300)
    AND c_custkey = o_custkey
    AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey
GROUP BY
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice
ORDER BY
    o_totalprice DESC,
    o_orderdate
LIMIT 100;

results.Schema: c_name: Utf8View, c_custkey: Int64, o_orderkey: Int64, o_orderdate: Date32, o_totalprice: Decimal128(15, 2), sum(lineitem.l_quantity): Decimal128(35, 2)

query:
SELECT
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice,
    sum(l_quantity)
FROM
    customer,
    orders,
    lineitem
WHERE
    o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT
            l_orderkey
        FROM
            lineitem
        GROUP BY
            l_orderkey
        HAVING
            sum(l_quantity) > 300)
    AND c_custkey = o_custkey
    AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey
GROUP BY
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice
ORDER BY
    o_totalprice DESC,
    o_orderdate
LIMIT 100;

results.Schema: c_name: Utf8View, c_custkey: Int64, o_orderkey: Int64, o_orderdate: Date32, o_totalprice: Decimal128(15, 2), sum(lineitem.l_quantity): Decimal128(35, 2)

query:
SELECT
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice,
    sum(l_quantity)
FROM
    customer,
    orders,
    lineitem
WHERE
    o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT
            l_orderkey
        FROM
            lineitem
        GROUP BY
            l_orderkey
        HAVING
            sum(l_quantity) > 300)
    AND c_custkey = o_custkey
    AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey
GROUP BY
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice
ORDER BY
    o_totalprice DESC,
    o_orderdate
LIMIT 100;

results.Schema: c_name: Utf8View, c_custkey: Int64, o_orderkey: Int64, o_orderdate: Date32, o_totalprice: Decimal128(15, 2), sum(lineitem.l_quantity): Decimal128(35, 2)

query:
SELECT
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice,
    sum(l_quantity)
FROM
    customer,
    orders,
    lineitem
WHERE
    o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT
            l_orderkey
        FROM
            lineitem
        GROUP BY
            l_orderkey
        HAVING
            sum(l_quantity) > 300)
    AND c_custkey = o_custkey
    AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey
GROUP BY
    c_name,
    c_custkey,
    o_orderkey,
    o_orderdate,
    o_totalprice
ORDER BY
    o_totalprice DESC,
    o_orderdate
LIMIT 100;

results.Schema: c_name: Utf8View, c_custkey: Int64, o_orderkey: Int64, o_orderdate: Date32, o_totalprice: Decimal128(15, 2), sum(lineitem.l_quantity): Decimal128(35, 2)
